16.gloss: that We may make them taste
16.glossMs: karena Kami hendak merasakan pada mereka

27.gloss: But surely We will cause to taste
and surely We will recompense them
27.glossMs: dan sungguh Kami akan memberi balasan mereka

46.gloss: then it is for his soul

50.gloss: and We will surely make them taste
50.glossMs: dan sungguh akan Kami rasakan kepada mereka
